methods.description: Process for performing Western blot analysis to detect specific proteins in plant material using immunoblotting techniques.

steps.description: Plant material (100 mg of samples) was homogenized in liquid nitrogen, and soluble proteins were extracted in 50 mM Tris-HCl (pH 7.5), 1 mM EGTA, 2 mM DTT plus 1 mM PMSF and cOmplete Protease Inhibitor Cocktail (Roche) according to the manufacturer's recommendation.
steps.searchable_summary: Homogenize plant material and extract soluble proteins using specified buffer and inhibitors.

steps.description: The homogenates were centrifuged at 16,000 g for 30 min at 4 °C.
steps.searchable_summary: Centrifuge homogenates to separate soluble proteins.

steps.description: Protein concentrations of the supernatants were measured, equal amounts of proteins were separated by electrophoresis on a 12.0% SDS-PAGE gel.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure protein concentration and perform SDS-PAGE.

steps.description: Proteins were semi-dry transferred to Amersham PVDF Hybond-P membrane (GE Healthcare).

Blocked blot was probed with a rabbit polyclonal antibody CRT PAb produced by Napier et al. [39], washed, and probed with the antibody against rabbit IgG conjugated with horseradish peroxidase (HRP, Merck).
steps.searchable_summary: Probe membrane with primary and secondary antibodies.

steps.description: Signal was detected with the Amersham ECL Advance Western Blotting Detection Kit according to the manufacturer's guidelines (GE Healthcare).
steps.searchable_summary: Detect protein signal using ECL detection kit.

steps.description: The membrane was stripped and re-probed with a primary antibody against glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate dehydrogenase (mouse anti-GAPDH IgG, Abcam). Detection was performed as described above using antimouse HRP-conjugated secondary antibody.
steps.searchable_summary: Strip and re-probe membrane with GAPDH antibody.

steps.description: Quantification of signals was done with Image Gauge 3.4 software (Science Lab99).
steps.searchable_summary: Quantify protein signals using Image Gauge software.

steps.description: Statistical significance of data was determined by a one-way ANOVA test.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform one-way ANOVA test on quantified data.
